rationales.hook_strength: 'It's not dirt' is a direct myth-bust that earns a second look, though it lacks a concrete outcome promise to fully seal the stop.
rationales.clarity: Each slide owns exactly one lever (sweat, fabric, scrubbing, laundry, sleep/sugar) with a single actionable takeaway.
rationales.audience_fit: Busy 20–35s who train and wonder why their back won't clear up is a precise, underserved pain point — not vague 'wellness.'
rationales.novelty: The sweat/friction framing is fresher than typical skincare carousels, though the individual tips (shower after gym, clean sheets) are familiar.
rationales.brand_fit: Voice is plain and direct, claims are hedged, CTA ties neatly to the sleep/food/water score — 'Calm the whole system' is the one phrase that edges toward vague.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential from the myth-bust hook and the list format; shares depend on whether the audience identifies with the problem strongly enough to tag someone.
